steps.name: RunningState core, real SSE message + elapsed + indeterminate progress (BR-1)
Cancel flow, confirm >30s + dang huy sub-state (BR-3, BR-4, consumes 4-7)
Integrate into every Duyet to AI-step transition + stepper background indicator
Wire up tests + verify all AC + real browser

decisions: Tests co-located as src/components/workspace/__tests__/*.test.tsx (matches actual vitest.config.ts include glob + sibling components PipelineStepper/StaleConfirmDialog), not frontend/tests/unit/components/ as the task file literally states -- that path isn't picked up by the working config. See memory/project-memory.md Open Questions (frontend test-directory convention undocumented).

RunningState.pct is number|null, caller-supplied. Today's backend (run_service.py/research/node.py) only ever publishes pct=0 ('started' placeholder) or pct=100 ('completed') -- never a real in-between fraction yet. Component treats pct<=0 as indeterminate (BR-1: no fabricated %); the integration layer (Step 5) decides whether to pass the real event pct straight through or null it out.

No package.json/pnpm-workspace at repo root -- ran vitest via `npx vitest` from frontend/ directly instead of `pnpm --filter frontend vitest run` as the task file's Verify line states; functionally equivalent, no workspace tooling exists to filter against.

RunningStateError takes error (pre-classified all_providers_failed|generic) + viewerRole ('admin'|'creator') as caller-supplied props, not derived internally -- no SSE event for errors exists yet in docs/specs/event-catalog.md (only step.progress/project.status), and frontend AuthProvider/useAuth has no role field today. Whoever wires this in (Step 5, or 5-6/5-7) must shape the run's `error` field into one of the two variants and supply the viewer's role from wherever that becomes available.
Admin 'Quan tri > Providers' link points at /admin/api-keys (closest existing admin page) -- no dedicated /admin/providers page exists yet. Revisit if/when one is built.

RunningStateCancel consumes 4-7's real contract (verified against origin/feat/4-7-dieu-khien-run-huy-ngam-resume, not yet merged to main): POST /projects/{id}/runs/{run_id}/cancel -> {run_id, status, cancelling}, event run.cancelled {project_id, run_id, step}. cancelConfirmed is caller-supplied (from the caller's own useEventStream run.cancelled listener) rather than this component opening its own subscription -- keeps it a pure/testable function per BR-4's 'wait for the real event, never optimistic'.

native element.click() in jsdom/happy-dom + React 19 did not reliably flush state updates before synchronous assertions in this component's tests (2/5 failed) -- switched to @testing-library/react's fireEvent.click, which wraps in act() and flushed correctly. Other existing component tests in this repo use raw .click() and pass, but hit simpler state-update shapes; fireEvent.click is the safer default going forward for any test asserting DOM state synchronously right after a click.

Step 5 scope call: only scenes/page.tsx exists among the 5 station pages today, and its 'Duyet' action is local station navigation with no real AI-step API call yet (5-2/5-5 own wiring the real calls there) -- 5-6 (Nghien cuu) and 5-7 (Noi dung), the screens that actually trigger POST steps/{step}/run, are still backlog/ready-for-dev. Rather than force-fitting RunningState into a fixture-only stub page, built RunningStateOverlay.tsx as the single generic drop-in integration point (combines RunningState + RunningStateError + RunningStateCancel + useEventStream + AC-1 auto-onDone) that 5-6/5-7 will mount directly -- matches this task file's own note that 5-8 must stay 'genuinely reusable... not tailored to one screen, or those tasks will need rework.' PipelineStepper's background ●%/indeterminate badge (AC-2 stepper half) is wired and tested against the existing component, no page rework needed for that part.

Extended useEventStream.ts's PipelineEvent.event_type union to include 'run.cancelled' (4-7's event) -- additive, backward compatible. Also fixed a pre-existing (not introduced by 5-8) tsc error at that same line (`data as PipelineEvent` -> `data as unknown as PipelineEvent`, TS2352) as a drive-by since RunningStateOverlay depends on this file typechecking cleanly.

Step 6 real-browser limitation: backend API (GET /projects, SSE event stream) is not currently served from a running dev-server. The e2e test file uses localStorage fixture injection + a __TEST_SET_EVENT_STREAM test-gate pattern; when the backend SSE adapter + station pages are wired to mount RunningStateOverlay, the existing tests become live-acceptance paths with no code changes needed. 40/40 vitest unit tests pass (6 test files).
